Name: Instructional Tome
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK.
Flavor: A simple primer for the training of mages.
Notes: Gates Arlia, Destined Trainee -> Mage Arlia

Name: Instructional Sword
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK.
Flavor: A simple sword for the training of knights.
Notes: Gates Arlia, Destined Trainee -> Squire Arlia

Name: Reagent Pouch
Text: When you play this item, draw a card.
Flavor: A little of everything, in case the world asks for it.
Notes: Neutral fuel

Name: Apprentice's Grimoire
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 ATK.
Flavor: The second book is always heavier than the first.

Name: Squire's Oathblade
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 DEF.
Flavor: Sworn steel remembers every vow it was forged under.

Name: Staff of Aelion
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK, and an additional +10 ATK if their element is Fire.
Flavor: Crafted by the Stewards of Aelion, this staff is particularly attuned to fire mages.

Name: Carrion Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK.
Flavor: A blade designed for protecting the living from the hungry dead.

Name: Archmage's Focus
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +20 ATK.
Flavor: Forged for a hand that has stopped trembling.

Name: Relic of the Forsaken
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 to all stats.
Flavor: Someone gave up everything to make this. It remembers the trade.

Name: Banner of the Realm
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character gains the chain ability "Rally - Chain 2 Kaethlaan Knights. Damage equals sum of ATK."
Flavor: It is not the cloth they follow. It is the idea the cloth insists upon.

Name: Feliefnir
Text: Equipped character gains +30 HP, +30 ATK, and +10 DEF. Equipped character cannot be targeted by opponent's equipped card effects.
Flavor: A legendary tome that is said to kill lesser magic users.

Name: Protection of The Divine
Text: Equipped character cannot be affected by item or event effects, whether friendly or hostile. If the equipped character is Disgraced, this item is destroyed.
Notes: RECONSTRUCTED from v0.7 session (was not in the prior project CSV). Mutual immunity (also blocks your own item/event effects on the bearer) is INTENTIONAL, not an oversight. Destruction-on-Disgrace is a functional downside clause (items are directly destroyable per the locked ruling). CONFIRM exact wording and flavor.

Name: Back-Alley Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK.
Flavor: The blade a street boy taught himself to kill with — the Army only noticed later.
Notes: Gates Kael, Destined Trainee -> Swiftblade Kael. Kael's T1 weapon-gate, parallel to Instructional Sword/Tome.

Name: Warmonger's Resolve
Text: Play only while a War is in play. Equipped character has +20 ATK while a War is in play.
Flavor: Some men are only at peace when the world is not.
Notes: Wartime-buff family (any-war, open). Stat +20 ATK. Power to be settled by playtest.

Name: Unbroken Will
Text: Equipped character cannot become War-Torn. If it is already War-Torn, it may attack anyway.
Flavor: Chains are a kind of question. He kept answering no.
Notes: Wartime-buff family. War-Torn tech: immunity + attack-through-War-Torn (the two spinoffs in one equip). Not war-gated, so it pre-empts capture. Softens War-Torn's cost by design - watch in playtest.

Name: Goblin War-Banner
Text: Equip only to a Goblin character. Equipped Goblin has +10 ATK. While a Goblin War is in play, it has +30 ATK instead.
Flavor: Raised by the biggest goblin who lived long enough to raise it.
Notes: Wartime-buff family (Goblin-locked + Goblin-War-specific scaling, +10 -> +30). Race-restricted equip.

Name: Sanctified Blade
Text: Equip only to a Light character. Equipped character has +10 ATK. While Holy War is in play, it cannot be targeted by Dark characters' attacks.
Flavor: Forged in a chapel, quenched in a war.
Notes: Wartime-buff family (Light-locked + Holy-War rider). Stat + non-stat protection vs Dark. Playtest the anti-Dark clause.

Name: Whetstone
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 ATK.
Flavor: A blade is just an opinion until it is sharp.
Notes: Cheap T1 transform fuel.

Name: Buckler
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 DEF.
Flavor: Small, round, and the reason he still has a face.
Notes: Cheap T1 transform fuel.

Name: Field Rations
Text: When you play this item, heal one of your characters 10.
Flavor: Hardtack and resolve.
Notes: Cheap on-play heal/sustain.

Name: Twin Daggers
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK and +10 DEF.
Flavor: Two answers to every question.
Notes: Modest balanced equip; no downside.

Name: Tidecaller's Pearl
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK, and an additional +10 ATK if their element is Water.
Flavor: It hums when the tide turns.
Notes: Water analog to Staff of Aelion.

Name: Tower Shield
Text: Equipped character gains +20 DEF and -10 ATK.
Flavor: You will not get past it. You will not get much done behind it either.
Notes: Defensive equip with an offense downside.

Name: Vital Charm
Text: Equipped character gains +20 HP and -10 ATK.
Flavor: It keeps the heart beating. It does not make the hand quicker.
Notes: HP equip with an offense downside.

Name: Berserker's Brand
Text: Equipped character gains +30 ATK and -20 DEF.
Flavor: The brand burns away everything but forward.
Notes: Aggro closer for fragile attackers; big offense for big exposure.

Name: Aegis Plate
Text: Equipped character gains +40 DEF and +20 HP, but has -20 ATK and cannot be declared as an attacker.
Flavor: A fortress you can wear. A fortress does not charge.
Notes: Pure wall with a hard downside.

Name: Warlord's Spoils
Text: When consumed in a transformation, the resulting character enters with +10 to all stats.
Flavor: To the strong, the leavings of the strong.
Notes: Strong T3 transform fuel; T3-gated.

Name: Kael's Tarnished Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK. Equip only to a Kael character.
Flavor: A street boy's first real blade — notched, but his.
Notes: Signature weapon (Kael-only). Forge base of the Kael blade line.

Name: Kael's Honed Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK and +10 DEF. Equip only to a Kael character.
Flavor: Whetted on every lesson the Army never meant to teach.
Notes: Forge from Kael's Tarnished Blade (cost: 1 item).

Name: Reaver's Edge
Text: Equipped character gains +40 ATK and +10 DEF, plus +10 ATK while a War is in play. Equip only to a Kael character.
Flavor: The blade stopped being a tool the day it learned his grief.
Notes: Forge from Kael's Honed Blade (cost: 2 items). War payoff.

Name: Arlia's Lance
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK and +10 DEF. Equip only to an Arlia character.
Flavor: Light given a shaft and a point.
Notes: Signature weapon (Arlia-only).

Name: Lance of the Archmage
Text: Equipped character gains +40 ATK and +10 DEF. Equip only to an Arlia character.
Flavor: She stopped reaching for the staff. The lance reached back.
Notes: Forge from Arlia's Lance (cost: 2 items).

Name: Khaneris Sword
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK and +10 DEF.
Flavor: A king's blade, before it was a legend.
Notes: Legendary lore weapon; forge base.

Name: The Great Sword of Khaneris
Text: Equipped character gains +40 ATK and +20 DEF.
Flavor: They do not name swords after the living.
Notes: Forge from Khaneris Sword (cost: 2 items).

Name: Rough Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK.
Flavor: Cheap steel, honestly forged.
Notes: Generic forge base (offense ladder).

Name: Tempered Edge
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK and +10 DEF.
Flavor: Folded until it stopped arguing.
Notes: Forge from Rough Blade (cost: 1 item).

Name: Masterwork Blade
Text: Equipped character gains +40 ATK and +10 DEF.
Flavor: The smith signed this one.
Notes: Forge from Tempered Edge (cost: 2 items).

Name: Round Shield
Text: Equipped character gains +10 DEF.
Flavor: A door you can carry.
Notes: Generic forge base — feeds the existing Tower Shield -> Aegis Plate ladder.

Name: Goblin Shiv
Text: Equipped character gains +10 ATK. Equip only to a Goblin character.
Flavor: Found, not made.
Notes: Goblin signature forge base.

Name: Goblin Cleaver
Text: Equipped character gains +20 ATK and +10 DEF. Equip only to a Goblin character.
Flavor: Bigger goblin, bigger answer.
Notes: Forge from Goblin Shiv (cost: 1 item).

Name: Warboss' Maul
Text: Equipped character gains +40 ATK and +10 DEF. Equip only to a Goblin character.
Flavor: The last argument the warband ever needs.
Notes: Forge from Goblin Cleaver (cost: 2 items).
